results.rendered_html:
asiknī [sitā keśādau śubhrā jaratī, tadbhinnā avṛddhā, sita-knādeśaḥ ṅīp ca  P. IV. 1. 39  Vārt.]
1 A young maidservant of the harem.
2 Night ( Nir. ).
3 N. of a river in the Punjaub, mentioned along with others in the line imaṃ me gaṃge yamune &c.
